channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: Iran war news, Trump threatens to ‘blow up’ world’s largest gas field if Tehran keeps attacking Qatar - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: Iran war news, Trump threatens to ‘blow up’ world’s largest gas field if Tehran keeps attacking Qatar  CNN
  2. Trump Says U.S. and Qatar Not Involved in Strike on Iran’s South Pars Gas Field  The New York Times
  3. Trump says Israel won't attack Iran gas field again after it 'violently lashed out'  Reuters
  4. Trump threatens to "massively blow up" Iranian gas field if Iran attacks Qatar  CBS News
  5. Oil and gas prices jump after Iran and Israel attack gasfields  The Guardian

item.description:

item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: Fossil fuels? No thanks. Why Trump’s Iran war is pushing EU toward renewables. - politico.eu

item.title: For U.S., Unmet Expectations in Iran Fit a Familiar Pattern in the Region - The New York Times
item.description:

  4. Trump is eager to declare victory, but a battered Iran still has cards to play  The Washington Post
  5. The Iran war may be about to escalate  The Economist
